kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://mock-api-h0g7.onrender.com/api/unknown/2 path_url=/api/unknown/2 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer Cle-API-ReqRes-test-academy'} body=None

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: {'data': {'id': 2, 'name': 'fuchsia rose', 'year': 2001, 'color': '#C74375', 'pantone_value': '17-2031'}, 'support': {'url': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/#support-heading', 'text': 'To keep TestAcademy free, contributions towards server costs are appreciated!'}}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

suite.stat: ROBOT API.07 Requete GET Single Resource
